headline: Shares of companies in the broader financial sector are trading lower amid overall market weakness, as investors react to reports that air defenses were activated in Tehran and to President Trump's social media post.

headline: Thoma Bravo Faces $5 Billion Wipeout As Medallia Heads To Lenders
summary: Thoma Bravo is inching closer to a deal that would transfer control of Medallia to its lenders, effectively erasing $5.1 billion.

headline: JPMorgan Readies Fresh Private Credit Push After Needling Market
summary: (Bloomberg) -- After years weighing how to dive deeper into private credit, JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s $4.3 trillion asset manager is committing to a strategy that will plow tens of billions of dollars into loans sourced by the firm’s commercial bankers.Most Read from BloombergAnthropic’s Mythos Model Is Being Accessed by Unauthorized UsersInside Alex Cooper’s Unwell: Tears, Screaming and Employees Looking for the ExitTrump Encourages Companies Not to Seek Tariff RefundsAlex Cooper, Husband Skip Tea
